title: acaena pumila var. glaberrima
intro: Acaena pumila var. glaberrima is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the hairy silver daisy bush, which belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in New Zealand, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Acaena pumila var. glaberrima have been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
